name: Ratatouille with Cinnamon Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a 1/2 inch slice along the length of each eggplant. If using round varieties, remove about one inch of the top.
2. Carefully scoop out the flesh, leaving a 1/2 inch thick wall.
3. Chop the eggplant flesh and place it in a medium-sized bowl. Toss with 1 tablespoon lemon juice. Set aside.
4. Brush the inside of each eggplant shell with another tablespoon of lemon juice.
5. In a skillet over medium heat, saute the onions and garlic in oil until softened.
6. Add the chopped eggplants, zucchini, and basil to the skillet. Cook, stirring, until the eggplants are tender.
7. Add the tomatoes and peppers; cook for 10 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and stir in parsley and any remaining lemon juice.
9. Divide the ratatouille among the eggplant shells.
10. Cool and serve at room temperature.
